text: I feel very happy because I completed the race, and again I reduced my minutes as well. It was a bit of an improvement, and I'm very happy. We never expected maybe we can go to the Olympics, but now the world knows the refugees. It's only we as refugees who can work hard to change that title, because I know to be called refugees is only a name. You can change that title to be a better person when we're together. We need to be patient because one day, one time, your time comes to change your life, and you can go change other people's lives.
